# Phil Greene

Phil Greene helps local service businesses turn more calls, website visits, and estimate requests into paying customers.

## Primary service

The Local Lead Recovery System combines conversion-focused website design, lead capture, missed-call text-back, SMS and email follow-up, appointment booking, CRM pipelines, review requests, and lead reporting.

## Who it serves

Local roofers, junk-removal companies, landscapers, painters, remodelers, cleaning companies, auto-repair shops, electricians, plumbers, HVAC companies, and similar service businesses.

## Location and contact

- Manchester, New Hampshire
- Email: me@philgreene.net
- Website: https://philgreene.net

## Technical background

Phil combines web development, automation, analytics, e-commerce operations, and experience in service, industrial, hospitality, and construction-adjacent environments. He is pursuing a B.S. in Data Science at Southern New Hampshire University.

## Links

- Technical work: https://philgreene.net/projects
- GitHub: https://github.com/WebCraftPhil
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/phil.greene1
